HERO.TITLE: Your 200-Days
HERO.LEAD: Master the language, secure your visa, and land your dream job in Germany within 200 days. A high-end editorial learning experience with a 100% job guarantee.

FEATURES.SECTION_SUB: Scroll through what unlocks the moment you join Glück Global.
FEATURES.LIVE_CLASSES_DESC: Join daily live German classes with expert teachers, and rewatch any session in HD — your attendance and watch progress are tracked automatically.
FEATURES.BUDDY_DESC: Meet your friendly fox tutor. Practice real German conversations out loud, any time of day, and get instant feedback on your pronunciation and answers.
FEATURES.EXERCISES_DESC: Interactive drills tied to each course day — grammar, vocabulary, listening and writing, graded instantly so you always know where you stand.
FEATURES.ARENA_DESC: Learning that feels like play — battle classmates in vocabulary games, climb the batch leaderboard, and earn XP as your German levels up.
FEATURES.CAREER_DESC: Browse curated German job openings, track your visa application stage by stage, and keep every document organised in one secure place.
FEATURES.PROGRESS_DESC: Your whole journey on one dashboard — course-day progress, class performance, exercise scores and milestones, all the way to Day 200.

ROADMAP.TITLE: Structured for Success
ROADMAP.SUB: Not just a language course — a complete relocation engine, from your first ‘Guten Tag’ to signing your work contract in Germany.
ROADMAP.DAY1_DESC: Meet your batch, teacher and Glück Buddy — A1 starts on day one.
ROADMAP.DAY50_DESC: Daily classes and speaking practice stack up — A2 milestone cleared.
ROADMAP.DAY100_DESC: Mock exams and analytics push you into B1 — the level employers want.
ROADMAP.DAY150_DESC: Visa filing begins while job matching pairs you with German employers.
ROADMAP.DAY200_DESC: Contract signed, relocation supported — backed by the 100% job guarantee.

CAREER.TITLE: From Classroom to Contract
CAREER.SUB: One team handles all of it — your language level, your visa file and your job hunt — tracked live in the portal.
CAREER.VISA_TITLE: Your visa, tracked stage by stage
CAREER.VISA_DESC: Upload documents once into your secure vault, then watch your application move through every stage — no chasing agents, no guesswork.
CAREER.JOB_TITLE: A job waiting at the end
CAREER.JOB_DESC: Curated openings from German employers appear in your portal as you approach the required language level — backed by our 100% job guarantee.

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked
FAQ.SUB: Everything you might want to know before you start your 200 days.
FAQ.Q1: Do I need any German before I join?
FAQ.A1: No prior German is needed. The journey starts at A1 on day one — complete beginners are exactly who the 200-day roadmap is built for, and Glück Buddy helps you practise speaking from the very first lesson.
FAQ.Q2: How does the 100% job guarantee work?
FAQ.A2: As you reach the required language level, curated openings from our German employer partners appear in your portal, and our team supports you through interviews and placement. The guarantee is backed by a written agreement when you enrol.
FAQ.A3: Both. You join daily live classes with expert teachers, and every session is recorded in HD so you can rewatch anytime. Your attendance and watch progress are tracked automatically in the portal.
FAQ.Q4: Do you handle the visa process too?
FAQ.A4: Yes. You upload your documents once into a secure vault, and we guide your application through every stage — verification, filing, interview prep and approval — with live status updates so you always know where things stand.
FAQ.Q5: Can I learn from outside Sri Lanka?
FAQ.A5: Absolutely. The entire experience — live classes, exercises, Glück Buddy, GlückArena and your progress dashboard — runs in the portal from any device, anywhere with an internet connection.

CTA.TITLE: Ready to start your 200 days?
CTA.SUBTITLE: Join 700+ students mastering German, securing visas and landing jobs in Germany — all from one portal.
